autor: that there really wasn’t one set formula for how to live your life nor how to handle the wife-mother-businesswoman juggling act. Maybe it was just being tuned in to every role and knowing when one or the other needed to be the focus.

Maybe it was just being tuned in to every role and knowing when one or the other needed to be the focus. sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “I'd learned balance is internal” articula sabedoria, kaira-rouda, here em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como here e home.
